Join Our Team

If you share a passion for our charitable vision, join our team!

The JUMP Math team is a group of creative, dynamic, and resourceful professionals who are committed to making a difference in education. We are dedicated to helping children realize their full potential by encouraging an understanding and a love of math in students and educators.

At JUMP Math we are also dedicated to excellence in education, creating math education resources that help others achieve measurable success, increased confidence and personal fulfilment. We believe in the importance of respect, inclusivity and diversity, of teamwork and authentic leadership and of being resilient and resourceful in our daily work.  If this sounds like you, consider joining our team!

There are no career opportunities available at the moment.
